E-Transformation & Solutions

Cash Management Hub

Manage Bank Hub, e-Collection, MT940 reconciliation directly within your business software.
e-Government Series

Install fully compliant e-Invoice and e-Ledger solutions naturally on your accounting system.
e-Commerce & Marketplace

Manage Shopify and marketplace orders, including payment and commission flows.
E-Collection Platform

Collect secure online payments from customers and dealers in seconds.
E-Statement & Open Banking

Open Banking solution that manages all bank accounts from a single panel.
E-POS Tracking & Reporting

Reporting solution that manages physical and virtual POS movements from a single panel.
E-DBS System

Manage your multi-bank Direct Debit System processes from a single panel.
E-Payment (Bulk)

Securely send your bulk payments to all banks simultaneously.
E-Cash Flow

Financial visibility and AI-powered cash forecasting platform.

Financial Transformation with eny

Transform your costly manual banking and accounting operations end-to-end with our high-performance platform.

architecture FINANCIAL TECHNOLOGY SERVICES

Automating Your
Financial Systems.

Strategic Focus Areas

We optimize high-volume financial processes and establish data-driven decision-making algorithms.

account_tree 1. Enterprise Platform Solutions

account_balance Flagship

Financial Accounting & Cost Management

We provide enterprise accounting, cost control, and actual costing in a single integrated architectural framework.

FI — Finansal Muhasebe

  • Defter-i Kebir (New GL)
  • Borçlar & Alacaklar (AP/AR)
  • Duran Varlık Yönetimi
  • Banka Muhasebesi
  • Vergi & e-Dönüşüm

CO — Kontroling

  • Maliyet Merkezi
  • Dahili Sipariş
  • Ürün Maliyetlendirme
  • Kârlılık Analizi (CO-PA)

Material Ledger

  • Gerçek Maliyet
  • Çoklu Para Birimi Değerleme
  • Stok Yeniden Değerleme
